name: Expert
skills: acrobatics: +12, performance: +6, persuasion: +6, sleight of hand: +8, stealth: +12
languages: Common, plus one of your choice

traits.name: Helpful
entries: The expert can take the Help action as a bonus action, and the creature who receives the help gains a 1d6 bonus to the d20 roll. If that roll is an attack roll, the creature can forgo adding the bonus to it, and then if the attack hits, the creature can add the bonus to the attack's damage roll against one target.

traits.name: Evasion
entries: When the expert is not incapacitated and subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, it instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if it failed.

traits.name: Tools
entries: The expert has thieves' tools and a musical instrument.

actions.name: Extra Attack
entries: The expert can attack twice, instead of once, whenever it takes the attack action on its turn.

actions.name: Shortsword
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage.

actions.name: Dagger
entries: *Melee Weapon or Ranged Weapon Attack:* +8 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. *Hit:* 6 (1d4 + 4) piercing damage.

actions.name: Shortbow
entries: *Ranged Weapon Attack:* +8 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. *Hit:* 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage.

traits.name: Blood Frenzy
entries: The giant shark skeleton has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its hit points.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 22 (3d10 + 6) piercing damage.

name: Lhammaruntosz
speed: walk 40 ft., fly 80 ft., swim 40 ft.
senses: blindsight 60 ft., darkvision 120 ft., passive Perception 22

traits.name: Amphibious
entries: Lhammaruntosz can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If Lhammaruntosz fails a saving throw, she can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Regeneration
entries: Lhammaruntosz regains 5 hit points at the start of her turn.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
entries: Lhammaruntosz's spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 17). She can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
1e/day: create food and water, detect thoughts, fog cloud, speak with animals

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
entries: Lhammaruntosz is an 8th-level spellcaster. Her spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 17; +9 to hit with spell attacks). She has the following sorcerer spells prepared:
0: light, mage hand, mending
1 (4 slots): charm person, detect magic, expeditious retreat, sleep
2 (3 slots): darkness, invisibility, suggestion
3 (3 slots): dispel magic, protection from energy
4 (2 slots): dimension door, stoneskin

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Lhammaruntosz can use her Frightful Presence. She then makes three attacks: one with her bite and two with her claws.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +12 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. *Hit:* 18 (2d10 + 7) piercing damage.

actions.name: Claw
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 14 (2d6 + 7) slashing damage.

actions.name: Tail
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +12 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. *Hit:* 16 (2d8 + 7) bludgeoning damage.

actions.name: Frightful Presence
entries: Each creature of Lhammaruntosz's choice that is within 120 feet of her and aware of her must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to Lhammaruntosz's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

actions.name: Breath Weapons 5
entries: Lhammaruntosz uses one of the following breath weapons.

actions.name: Lightning Breath
entries: Lhammaruntosz exhales lightning in a 90-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 19 Dexterity saving throw, taking 66 (12d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

actions.name: Repulsion Breath
entries: Lhammaruntosz exhales repulsion energy in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 19 Strength saving throw. On a failed save, the creature is pushed 60 feet away from the dragon.

actions.name: Change Shape
entries: Lhammaruntosz magically polymorphs into a humanoid or beast that has a challenge rating no higher than her own, or back into her true form. She reverts to her true form if she dies. Any equipment she is wearing or carrying is absorbed or borne by the new form (Lhammaruntosz's choice).

In a new form, Lhammaruntosz retains her alignment, hit points, Hit Dice, ability to speak, proficiencies, Legendary Resistance, lair actions, and Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores, as well as this action. Her statistics and capabilities are otherwise replaced by those of the new form, except any class features or legendary actions of that form.

legendaryActions.name: Detect
entries: Lhammaruntosz makes a Wisdom (Perception) check.

legendaryActions.name: Tail Attack
entries: Lhammaruntosz makes a tail attack.

legendaryActions.name: Wing Attack (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Lhammaruntosz beats its wings. Each creature within 10 feet of Lhammaruntosz must succeed on a DC 20 Dexterity saving throw or take 14 (2d6 + 7) bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone. Lhammaruntosz can then fly up to half her flying speed.

name: Spellcaster (Healer)
languages: Common, plus one of your choice

traits.name: Potent Cantrip
entries: The spellcaster can add its spellcasting ability modifier to the damage it deals with any cantrip.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Healer)
entries: The spellcaster's spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 16, +8 to hit with spell attacks). The spellcaster has following cleric spells prepared:
0: guidance, light, resistance, sacred flame
1 (4 slots): bless, cure wounds, shield of faith
2 (3 slots): aid, lesser restoration
3 (3 slots): protection from energy, revivify
4 (3 slots): banishment, death ward
5 (1 slots): greater restoration

actions.name: Quarterstaff
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage, or 4 (1d8) bludgeoning damage if used with two hands.

name: Spellcaster (Mage)
languages: Common, plus one of your choice

traits.name: Potent Cantrip
entries: The spellcaster can add its spellcasting ability modifier to the damage it deals with any cantrip.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting (Mage)
entries: The spellcaster's spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 16, +8 to hit with spell attacks). The spellcaster has following wizard spells prepared:
0: fire bolt, light, mage hand, minor illusion
1 (4 slots): burning hands, shield, sleep
2 (3 slots): flaming sphere, invisibility
3 (3 slots): fireball, fly
4 (3 slots): polymorph, wall of fire
5 (1 slots): cone of cold

actions.name: Quarterstaff
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage, or 4 (1d8) bludgeoning damage if used with two hands.

name: Warrior
languages: Common, plus one of your choice

traits.name: Battle Readiness
entries: The warrior has advantage on initiative rolls.

traits.name: Improved Critical
entries: The warrior's attack rolls score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20 on the d20.

traits.name: Indomitable (1/Day)
entries: The warrior can reroll a saving throw that it fails, but it must use the new result.

traits.name: Martial Role
entries: The warrior has one of the following traits of your choice:

- Attacker The warrior gains a +2 bonus to attack rolls.
- Defender The warrior gains the Protection reaction below.

traits.name: Second Wind (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: The warrior can use a bonus action on its turn to regain hit points equal to 1d10 + its level.

actions.name: Extra Attack
entries: The warrior can attack twice, instead of once, whenever it takes the attack action on its turn.

actions.name: Longsword
entries: *Melee Weapon Attack:* +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage, or 9 (1d10 + 4) slashing damage if used with two hands.

actions.name: Longbow
entries: *Ranged Weapon Attack:* +6 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. *Hit:* 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage.

reactions.name: Protection (Defender Only)
entries: When a creature the warrior can see attacks a target other than the warrior that is within 5 feet of the warrior, the warrior can use their reaction to impose disadvantage on the attack roll. The warrior must be wielding a shield.
